description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The structure is composed of multiple rectangular volumes, with flat roofs and subtle horizontal siding details. There are several covered outdoor spaces, including a partially enclosed patio with wooden slats and a recessed balcony area. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of narrow vertical strips and horizontal openings, providing both privacy and natural light. The main entryway is understated, set back beneath an overhang and flanked by a wooden screen for added texture. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, emphasizing simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, minimalist house with flat roofs, white exterior, and asymmetrical windows, featuring covered patios and wooden accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, wooden slat screen, and a covered patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the recessed balcony, flat roof sections, and a prominent vertical window strip.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window openings and a large, solid wall section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying a tall vertical window and a wooden-framed outdoor space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with vertical strips and horizontal openings
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a flat overhang, flanked by a wooden slat screen, minimal decorative elements
